variants: Mariam Koorosh is a specialist in Computational Linguistics, known for her innovative contributions to the field. Among her notable works is the Juniper Touch System, which garnered attention for its advancements. In recognition of her efforts, she received the Elderwood Emblem, an esteemed honor in the academic community. In addition to her professional endeavors, Mariam is an active member of the Wildroot Beadmakers, where she engages in her passion for bead making. She completed her doctoral studies under the mentorship of Shreya Verma, who guided her through her research and development.
